title: teucrium commune subsp. capitatum
intro: Teucrium commune subsp. capitatum, also known as the Italian germander or capitate germander, is a subspecies of the Teucrium commune plant, a member of the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Teucrium commune subsp. capitatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
